Сгенерировано из: {{docs/obsidian/habr-unique-projects/software-pairs/README.md}}
Дата: 2026-04-29
{info}

----
title: "software-pairs"
tags:
  * habr-unique-projects
date: 2026-04-29
----

h1. software-pairs

_Файлов:_ 6

h2. Содержание

* [[1-workflow-llm-mcp|1-workflow-llm-mcp.md]] — 
* [[2-pkm-mcp-skills|2-pkm-mcp-skills.md]] — 
* [[3-crdt-self-hosted|3-crdt-self-hosted.md]] — 
* [[4-speech-to-text-llm|4-speech-to-text-llm.md]] — 
* [[5-browser-agents-headless|5-browser-agents-headless.md]] — 
* [[6-metaphor|6-metaphor.md]] —

_Похожие документы:_
* [[README]] (сходство 0.21)

* [[README]] (сходство 0.17)
